text.title: Accessibility as Code Procedure
text.summary: 7-step procedure to apply Accessibility as Code end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: inventory
step.action: List existing test layers and identify a11y gap.

step.name: add-unit-helpers
step.action: Add or document patterns querying by role + name; deprecate testid-only patterns.

step.name: wire-axe
step.action: Add axe-core to integration tests; pick critical routes.

step.name: ci-job
step.action: Add a11y job; set failure level to critical/serious; document the run command.

step.name: known-issues
step.action: Capture current violations into a namespaced suppression list with expiries.

step.name: storybook-variants
step.action: Add stories for error/focus/disabled/loading states; configure storybook-test-runner with axe.
